documentation.description:
Status of geo-fencing. Sent in extended status stream when fencing
enabled.

record_types.name: Fence_Status

fields.name: Breach_Status
fields.description: Breach status (0 if currently inside fence, 1 if outside).

fields.name: Breach_Time
fields.description:
Units: [ms]
Time (since boot) of last breach.

True if x25crc is valid for the message.
